tierlan_uncertain.speaker: Tierlan
tierlan_uncertain.text: He's cleaning his blade. Doesn't look up. "You watched the alpha longer than the fight required. I noticed. Not judging." He goes back to the blade.

mireille_male_drawn.speaker: Mireille
mireille_male_drawn.notebook_text: Day [X]. The attraction vector has shifted measurably. I've been tracking the micro-expressions during encounters. I don't know how to tell [name] what I'm seeing. I'm not sure it would help.

saoirse_seeking.speaker: Saoirse
saoirse_seeking.text: She finds a private moment. "I know what's happening to you. I watched it happen to someone else once. I didn't say anything then either, and I've regretted it. So I'm saying it now: I see you. Whatever direction this goes. I'm not going anywhere." She walks away before you can respond.

monologue_phases.uncertain: That didn't mean anything. The alpha was threatening. You were scared. Fear and arousal share the same nervous system. It's biology. It meant nothing.
monologue_phases.male-drawn: You caught yourself. Watching him. The way he moved. The width of his shoulders. You caught yourself and you looked away and your heart was doing something embarrassing.
monologue_phases.seeking dominance: You know what it means. You've known for a while. The question you keep not asking yourself is when exactly it stopped feeling like corruption and started feeling like — something else.
monologue_phases.devoted to manhood: The word you've been avoiding is want. Simple. Declarative. You want. The rest of it — what you want, who you've become, what that says about everything — that can wait. Right now just: you want.
